description: Deterministic live GitHub pull-request readiness checks used immediately before merge or auto-merge decisions.

checks.expectation: The PR state is OPEN before a merge or auto-merge decision.
The PR is not marked draft unless the workflow intentionally stops before merge.
The PR is MERGEABLE. CONFLICTING is a fail; unknown or delayed mergeability is a warning requiring fresh live state.
No blocking review decision is present. Required review gaps or requested changes block direct merge.
Visible status checks are passing for direct merge. Failing checks block; pending checks require auto-merge or waiting.
Auto-merge is configured only when GitHub should wait for remaining requirements. Absence is a warning, not a direct-merge blocker.

approved_drift.condition: The current workflow intends an immediate direct merge after required gates are satisfied.
approved_drift.approval: Treat missing auto-merge as approved drift for direct-merge workflows.

approved_drift.condition: The workflow is intentionally enabling auto-merge while checks are still pending.
approved_drift.approval: Pending checks are acceptable only when auto-merge is used and no failing checks are present.
